dashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
dashboard.subtitleDistrict: Managing {{district}} district — configure forms, upload tutorials, and control assessments.
dashboard.subtitleDefault: Manage your platform from here — configure forms, upload tutorials, and control assessments.

districts.label: Manage Districts
districts.desc: Add, edit, or remove program districts

form.label: Configure Registration Form
form.desc: Add, remove, or reorder registration fields

tutorials.label: Manage Tutorials & Stages
tutorials.desc: Upload YouTube videos, clip sections, manage stages

tests.label: Test Manager
tests.desc: Upload questions, start/stop tests, download results

districts.title: District Management
districts.description: Add, edit, or remove program districts. Each district has its own registration form, tutorials, and assessments.
districts.emptyBody: Create your first program district to get started.
districts.nameHelp: A unique slug will be auto-generated from the name. The district will get its own registration form, tutorials, and tests.
districts.confirmDelete: Delete district "{{name}}"? All associated stages, tutorials, and tests will be removed. Users will be unassigned.

tracking.title: Tutorial Tracking
tracking.description: Watch time, watch % and post-tutorial quiz outcomes for every user in {{district}} — spot who is skipping the videos.
tracking.emptyBody: No users are registered in this district yet.
tracking.footnote: Performance score = 60% average watch percentage + 20% quiz participation + 20% quiz accuracy. Tutorials marked "?" have a quiz enabled.
